'''[[Cannibalism|Cannibal]] arachnids''' were an immense insectoid [[Species/Legends|species]] native to [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] that were eventually driven to extinction by that [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] pollution.

{{Creature-stub}}
